column1: # Combination recipes: a GE item made by combining other GE items.
# Names are matched case-insensitively against the game's item names, and every id is resolved
# from the game at runtime -- a name that doesn't resolve is simply skipped, never guessed.
# Only verified two-plus-item combinations belong here; add rows as they are confirmed.
# Godswords: blade + hilt (and the blade itself from three shards)
# Ancient sceptre variants (Desert Treasure II quartz) - verified on the wiki
# Revamped wilderness weapons (uncharged, tradeable) - verified on the wiki
# Magic fang trident (uncharged, tradeable) - verified on the wiki
# Mutagen helms (uncharged, tradeable) - magma verified on the wiki, tanzanite same pattern
# Wands / capes (Ava's arrows quantity not shown, cost negligible)
# Max capes (base cape + max cape + max hood) - fire and infernal verified; family follows the pattern
